rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence backend

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence to store

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rawCommits.subject: fix(aura3d): move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404
rawCommits.body:
Artifact routes in process_routes were shadowed by axum router
merge — GET returned 404 while OPTIONS passed via CORS. Moving
to project_routes where all /api/projects/:project_id routes
live resolves the trie conflict.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404

rawCommits.subject: Fix Windows updater handoff
rawCommits.cleanSubject: Fix Windows updater handoff

rendered.title: AURA 3D studio debuts alongside nightly release hardening
rendered.intro: A big day for Aura: a brand-new AURA 3D app landed end-to-end, going from an empty scaffold to a working image-to-3D studio with WebGL preview, project-linked persistence, and polished navigation. In parallel, the release pipeline got meaningfully sturdier — nightly asset pruning, changelog media history, and the Windows updater handoff all saw targeted fixes.

entries.title: Nightly release pruning, changelog media sync, and GPT-5.5 model
entries.summary: Release infrastructure got a substantial reliability pass, the AI-assisted changelog media pipeline grew stricter proofing, and GPT-5.5 joined the model selector.

items.text: Replaced inline asset pruning in the nightly workflow with a retry-aware script that tolerates missing releases and missing assets, and added a new workflow plus sync script to keep changelog media history in step with the latest entries.
Added a dedicated gh-pages republish recovery workflow backed by a retrying commit helper, giving the team a safety net when changelog publishes fail to push.
Tightened the AI changelog media pipeline with a stricter tool-based inference step (prompt v4), sharper framing, crisper preserved screenshots, and larger branded proof cards.
Added GPT-5.5 to the model registry and chat input selector, and started reporting ZERO Pro status alongside usage from the dev loop.

media.reason: Primarily release infrastructure, CI workflow hardening, and changelog media tooling. The only user-facing bit (GPT-5.5 in the model selector) is a subtle dropdown entry that would look identical to any other model row and isn't a durable product surface worth a screenshot.
reasons: Primarily release infrastructure, CI workflow hardening, and changelog media tooling. The only user-facing bit (GPT-5.5 in the model selector) is a subtle dropdown entry that would look identical to any other model row and isn't a durable product surface worth a screenshot.

entry language points to release plumbing rather than a product screen

entries.title: AURA 3D app debuts with image-to-3D generation and WebGL viewer
entries.summary: A new AURA 3D studio app was scaffolded, wired to live generation streams, and given a full Three.js-based viewer, all gated behind a feature flag for early testing.

items.text: Introduced a new AURA 3D app in the registry at /3d with a Box icon, left-nav asset history, and a Zustand-backed store, pulling in Three.js as a dependency for the upcoming viewer.
Replaced the initial tab stubs with a single-page image generation flow backed by an SSE stream, a style-locked prompt, and a sidekick panel for browsing generated Images and Models.

Added a Three.js WebGLViewer with a 4-light rig, GLTF loading with auto-center/scale, lifecycle cleanup, and toggles for grid, wireframe, and texture, wired to a Tripo-backed 3D generation stream that auto-picks up the generated source image.
Added a project selector in the left nav, gated the app behind the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D flag, and locked in store behavior with a suite of unit tests covering generation, selection, and error states.

media.reason: Introduces a brand-new AURA 3D app with a WebGL viewer, image-to-3D flow, sidekick panels, and left nav. This is a major new user-visible product surface that a single screenshot can clearly prove.
reasons: Introduces a brand-new AURA 3D app with a WebGL viewer, image-to-3D flow, sidekick panels, and left nav. This is a major new user-visible product surface that a single screenshot can clearly prove.

entry language points to a visible product surface

media.captureHint: Open the AURA 3D app with VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D enabled; generate or load a sample image and 3D model so both the image preview and the WebGL viewer are populated, with the left-nav asset history and sidekick Images/Models tabs visible
media.storyTitle: AURA 3D app debuts with image-to-3D generation and WebGL viewer

entries.title: SSE proxy now accepts data-only generation frames
entries.summary: Fixed a silent dropout where the Aura router's data-only SSE frames were being discarded by the proxy.

items.text: The generation proxy now derives the event type from the JSON data field when an upstream frame omits the event: line, so start/progress/completion events from aura-router reach the client instead of being silently dropped.

media.reason: Backend SSE proxy fix in a Rust handler. No visible UI change; a screenshot cannot prove that data-only frames are now parsed.
reasons: Backend SSE proxy fix in a Rust handler. No visible UI change; a screenshot cannot prove that data-only frames are now parsed.
entry only touches release or infrastructure files
media.alt: SSE proxy now accepts data-only generation frames screenshot
media.storyTitle: SSE proxy now accepts data-only generation frames

entries.title: AURA 3D layout moves to tabs with a project-tree left nav
entries.summary: Based on early feedback, the 3D studio switched from a stacked split to Image/3D Model tabs and adopted the shared LeftMenuTree for project navigation.

items.text: Replaced the 50/50 horizontal split with Image and 3D Model tabs in the main panel, and swapped the custom project dropdown for the shared LeftMenuTree so navigation matches the Projects app.
Added an IMAGE section header with a click-to-expand lightbox for generated images, including backdrop and X-button close, before the layout shift to tabs superseded the headers.

media.reason: A clear layout change in the AURA 3D app: tabs (Image / 3D Model) replacing the stacked split, plus the shared LeftMenuTree project nav. This is durable and visible in one screenshot. The lightbox item is transient, but the tab layout + tree nav is a stable proof surface.
reasons: A clear layout change in the AURA 3D app: tabs (Image / 3D Model) replacing the stacked split, plus the shared LeftMenuTree project nav. This is durable and visible in one screenshot. The lightbox item is transient, but the tab layout + tree nav is a stable proof surface.

media.storyTitle: AURA 3D layout moves to tabs with a project-tree left nav

entries.title: 3D artifacts persist per project and the studio comes out of flag gating
entries.summary: AURA 3D gained end-to-end artifact persistence, a polished nav and sidekick, parent-linked image-to-model chains, and was promoted out of feature-flag gating.

items.text: Added a project artifacts backend in aura-os-storage with list/create/get/delete, exposed via JWT-authenticated proxy routes under /api/projects/:id/artifacts, and fixed a router trie conflict that was making GET return 404 while OPTIONS passed.

Wired artifact persistence into the 3D store so selecting a project loads its saved images and models, stripping the style-lock suffix for display and linking models to source images via sourceImageId/parentId.

Polished the studio surface: left nav shows images and models as icon-prefixed children under each project, sidekick panels use a thumbnail grid with section headings, viewer controls became icon toggles, Generate 3D hides once a model is loaded, and progress messages cycle during generation.
Enforced project selection before generation is allowed and removed the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D flag, making AURA 3D visible to everyone by default.

media.reason: Significant user-visible polish: left nav shows images and models as children under projects, sidekick uses a thumbnail grid with section headings, viewer has icon toggles, and the app is no longer flag-gated (visible to everyone). One screenshot of a project with saved artifacts can prove persistence + polish.
reasons: Significant user-visible polish: left nav shows images and models as children under projects, sidekick uses a thumbnail grid with section headings, viewer has icon toggles, and the app is no longer flag-gated (visible to everyone). One screenshot of a project with saved artifacts can prove persistence + polish.

entries.title: Windows desktop updater handoff fix
entries.summary: Late-day desktop fix restored reliable auto-update handoff on Windows, with validation tightened in CI and local smoke scripts.

items.text: Fixed the Windows updater handoff in the desktop app and updated the desktop-validate workflow, local auto-update smoke script, and CI verifier to catch regressions earlier.

media.reason: Windows updater handoff fix plus CI verifier updates. No UI surface changes; behavior is only observable during an update handoff and cannot be proven in a single static screenshot.
reasons: Windows updater handoff fix plus CI verifier updates. No UI surface changes; behavior is only observable during an update handoff and cannot be proven in a single static screenshot.
